Container.Name: Klient
Container.Overview: Klient is a self-hosted client portal for freelancers and agencies. Manage projects, tasks, files, and client communication — fully under your control.
Container.Description: Klient is a self-hosted client portal for freelancers and agencies. Manage projects, tasks, files, and client communication — fully under your control. Default login: admin@klient.local / changeme123

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Klient web interface

Config.Name: NEXTAUTH_SECRET
Config.Description: Random secret for session encryption. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

Config.Name: NEXTAUTH_URL
Config.Description: Public URL of your Klient instance

Config.Name: DATABASE_URL
Config.Description: SQLite database path (do not change unless you know what you are doing)
